title: Partner handoff + flip verifiedNeed on signed confirmation
context: verifiedNeed stays false until a named partner confirms in writing that they will consume the dataset. This task documents the partner handoff and the procedure to flip verifiedNeed and assign a delivery steward once that confirmation exists. Strictly aggregate, de-identified, open-access data only; no patient-level data; not medical advice.
objective: Document the partner handoff: secure a named partner's written confirmation of consumption, flip verifiedNeed to true in affected tasks, and assign a last-mile delivery steward.
acceptanceCriteria: Named partner confirms consumption in writing; verifiedNeed flips to true in affected tasks.
Steward role assigned for last-mile delivery.
Handoff record documents the partner, scope, and channel.
output: /output/ops/partner-handoff.md documenting the confirmation and verifiedNeed updates, committed to the repo.
